pages.text: $(o)"Park your battery and walk away."$()$(br2)The $(l)Mana Dock$() automatically charges or drains a $(l)Mana Storage$() item placed in its slot, drawing from / pushing to the surrounding network.

pages.title: Modes
pages.text: Three modes, cycled with $(l)Sneak + Empty Right-Click$():$(br)· $(6)CHARGE$() �?network �?item$(br)· $(b)DRAIN$() �?item �?network$(br)· $(7)OFF$() �?no transfer$(br2)Default is $(l)CHARGE$().

pages.title: Slot Management
pages.text: $(l)Right-click$() with a Mana Storage �?insert / swap.$(br2)$(l)Right-click$() empty-handed �?take out (or show actionbar status if empty).$(br2)Internal buffer: $(l)256 CM$(), $(l)16 CM/tick$() at 4 Hz.

pages.title: Comparator Output
pages.text: Comparator output = buffer percentage mapped to 0-15.$(br2)Use this to detect 'battery full' or 'battery low' for redstone automation: e.g. flip a Mana Regulator off when this reads 15.
